changeSet.author: Gabriel
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE usuario ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, nome VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(150) NOT NULL UNIQUE, password VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, -- Atualizado para refletir a mudança na entidade criado_em TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: Gabriel
Gabriel
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE users_roles ( user_id BIGINT NOT NULL, role_id BIGINT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (user_id, role_id), CONSTRAINT fk_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES usuario (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT fk_role FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES role (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );
